violations.text: Dishmachine out of service and in poor repair prior to inspection. Establishment to use 3 bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize dishes. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Dishmachine was observed leaking onto floor when in service. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Establishment to use 3 bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
